boundary_route_fanin.read: Actual LightningIndexer top-k fan-in is counted per compressed group from the TorchTitan-shaped boundary tensors. Prefix stats are the structured route used by earlier synthetic dKV probes at the same top-k; matching totals do not imply matching topology.

decision_fields.dense_token_union_score_expansion_x: Extra QK/PV row work if a kernel computes dense token x union scores and masks non-selected pairs.
decision_fields.operand_kv_load_reuse_x: Reuse available when compressed K/V rows are loaded once per union tile instead of once per token-selected row.
decision_fields.token_union_membership_density: Inverse of dense expansion. Low density means a dense union GEMM will waste work.

read: A shared compressed-group union axis is the right operand contract, but whether the first kernel should compute dense token x union scores or sparse membership-selected pairs depends on the measured union density. The existing T4/T8 pairwise fold is rejected because it uses dense token-token route matrices after per-token selected math instead of this union operand.
scope: metadata-only plan for reformulating token-expanded dKV operands around compressed-group union tiles
